# Tyuta

> Tyuta (טיוטה) is a Hebrew-first writing community for writers in Israel: a home for writing, sharing, and reading original Hebrew texts.

## Primary Pages

- [Homepage](https://tyuta.net/): Tyuta, the place for every version of your writing.
- [Stories](https://tyuta.net/c/stories): Short stories, true stories, serialized prose, and original Hebrew fiction.
- [Personal Writing](https://tyuta.net/c/release): Personal writing, thoughts, poems, confessions, release, and emotional texts in Hebrew.
- [Magazine](https://tyuta.net/c/magazine): Community magazine for writing culture, opinions, essays, and curiosity around Hebrew writing.
- [About Tyuta](https://tyuta.net/about): The story and purpose of Tyuta as a home for Hebrew writers.
- [Sitemap](https://tyuta.net/sitemap.xml): Canonical XML sitemap for public pages, posts, profiles, and image discovery.

## Content Model

- Public post pages are original user-authored writing.
- Public profile pages represent writers in the Tyuta community.
- Post pages should use the post cover image when available.
- Profile pages should use the writer profile image shown on the page.
- The platform is intended for Hebrew readers and writers in Israel.

## Core Topics

- Hebrew writing
- Israeli writing community
- Stories and short stories
- Poems
- Personal writing
- Confessions
- Thoughts
- Writing, sharing, and reading original texts

## Language

Primary language: Hebrew (he-IL)
